heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy north of Route 4 with a chance of scattered showers after midnight, partly cloudy south. Lows from the upper 50s to mid 60s. Light southwest wind.

heading: Saturday
text: Rain showers north, with a chance for embedded storms in the afternoon. Some sun in the south early, then a good chance of afternoon showers and passing thunderstorms. Highs from the mid 70s to near 80, mid to upper 80s in the southern valleys. Winds varying from south to west near 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph over the Greens.

heading: Saturday Night
text: Scattered showers, with a chance for a few evening thunderstorms. Main impacts will be heavy rain, strong winds, and hail. Lows in the 50s to low 60s.
